title: Clockwork Additions
description: Additions to the Create X Valkyrien Skies: Clockwork mod
body:
# ~~DOES NOT CURRENTLY WORK ON MULTIPLAYER, ALREADY FIXED IN DEV.~~
## All versions above 0.0.6 support multiplayer.

Clockwork Additions is a QoL mod that adds several features to Clockwork and Valkyrien Skies

**Blocks and Features:**

- The Pedal Block produces SU when a player is sitting on it and attempting to walk forward. It produces 320 SU at 32 RPM normally, and 640 SU at 64 RPM when sprinting. It can also be reversed by attempting to walk backwards.
  
- The Handlebar is controlled by sitting in front of it and using the A and D keys. It will rotate 45 degrees in each direction with 128 SU.
  
- The Constant Velocity Joint is flexible shaft that works between ships. It has a maximum range of 3 blocks.
  
- The Kinetic Flap Bearing is a Clockwork Flap Bearing that rotates when given clockwise or counterclockwise rotation, instead of being activated with redstone.
  
- The Copycat Wing and Flap work as normal wings and flaps, but can also have their textures changed by right-clicking them with a block.
